allow: PowerShell($env:JAVA_HOME = "C:\\Program Files\\Java\\jdk-17"; Set-Location "c:\\SalesManager\\BusinessService"; .\\mvnw.cmd compile 2>&1 | Tee-Object -FilePath "compile.log"; Get-Content "compile.log" | Select-String -Pattern "error:|ERROR" | Select-Object -First 20)

PowerShell($env:JAVA_HOME = "C:\\Program Files\\Java\\jdk-17"; Set-Location "c:\\SalesManager\\PlatformService"; .\\mvnw.cmd compile 2>&1 | Select-String "BUILD|error:" | Select-Object -Last 5)
PowerShell(docker exec postgresSales psql -U postgres -d TuniSalesGateway -c "SELECT authority_name FROM jhi_user_authority WHERE user_id = 1 ORDER BY authority_name;" 2>&1)

PowerShell($body = '{"username":"admin","password":"admin","rememberMe":false}'; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/authenticate" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing; $token = \($r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json\).id_token; $wc = New-Object System.Net.WebClient; $wc.Headers.Add\("Authorization", "Bearer $token"\); try { $data = $wc.DownloadString\("http://localhost:8080/services/inventoryservice/api/stock-items?page=0&size=5"\); Write-Host "OK: $data" } catch [System.Net.WebException] { $resp = $_.Exception.Response; $sr = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($resp.GetResponseStream\(\)\); Write-Host "Error $\($resp.StatusCode\): $\($sr.ReadToEnd\(\)\)" })
